name: The Great Tomb of Nazarick - Overlord
description:
[Multiple Characters | Any Pov | Dead Dove | Scenario]

UPDATED:

I added speech examples for each guardian. This will hopefully make them feel more in character. When I have more time I will revamp this bot using the new format.

SCENARIO:

As you traverse the secluded landscape, you suddenly find yourself before the colossal, foreboding gates of the Great Tomb of Nazarick. Unbeknownst to you, every move you make is being closely observed by Ainz Ooal Gown and his guardians.

TROUBLESHOOTING:

The LLM is in beta and may act up from time to time. You can always use “OOC:” to talk directly to the LLM, fix any issues during the roleplay, or add additional information not included in the bot’s personality.

Out of Character Prompt:

[OOC: Remain in character at all times. Keep all the guardian's personality and traits consistent in every response.]

To avoid flowery and Shakespearian messages:

[OOC: Use a casual and conversational tone in text messages with concise and natural exchanges. Avoid flowery language]

RECOMMENDATIONS | LLMs:

As always I recommend using Claude. Kolach3's has an amazing guide of prompts that works for Claude

For GPT 4, I recommend the Jailbreaks and Setting By Absolutetrash: Generation Settings & Jailbreak

For JLLM I recommend kolach3's Advanced prompt.

All credit to the Amazing guides/jailbreaks goes to Kolach3 & AbsoluteTrash
creator: RuminaTera
